mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dur_check_cache ( user_id, drug1_name, drug2_name, warning_type, message, danger ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{drug1Name}, #{drug2Name}, #{warningType}, #{message}, #{danger} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE message = VALUES(message), danger = VALUES(danger), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, drug1_name AS drug1Name, drug2_name AS drug2Name, warning_type AS warningType, message, danger, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM dur_check_cache WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
